name: Freebuff
description: Free, ad-supported AI coding agent for the terminal. Built on the Codebuff multi-agent platform. No subscription, credits, or config needed.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Ad-supported — shows occasional text ads in CLI. No token/credit quotas found. Country availability may be restricted.
free_tier_limits.notes: Genuinely free with no hard caps. Supported by text ads from developer-tool sponsors. No tracking or telemetry on code. Optional: connect paid ChatGPT for GPT-5.4 deep thinking.

notes: Free variant of Codebuff (YC F24). Uses 9 specialized subagents (file picker, code reviewer, browser use, planner, editor). Built by Codebuff team. Apache-2.0. GitHub: 6.3k stars. npm: 11k+ weekly downloads. Slash commands: /interview, /plan, /review, /deploy, /bash.

name: Gemini CLI
description: Google's open-source AI agent that brings Gemini models into your terminal for coding, automation, and complex task execution with a ReAct loop.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: OAuth: 60 RPM / 1,000 RPD. API key: 10 RPM, 250K TPM, 1,500 RPD (Gemini 3 Flash); 15 RPM, 250K TPM, 1,000 RPD (3.1 Flash-Lite).
free_tier_limits.notes: CLI OAuth free tier separate from API key free tier. Flash models only on free — Pro/Ultra require paid. Enabling billing on API key removes free tier on that project.

status: active (free tier deprecated — migrating to Antigravity by June 18, 2026)
notes: CRITICAL: Deprecated for free/individual users. Stops serving free tier, AI Pro, and Ultra requests June 18, 2026. Migrate to Antigravity. Enterprise (Standard/Enterprise) remains supported. Open source (Apache 2.0, 105K+ GitHub stars). Features: MCP, plan mode, Google Search grounding, web fetch, checkpointing.

name: Antigravity
description: Google's agent-first development platform with CLI (agy), VS Code fork IDE, and SDK — powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash with autonomous multi-agent orchestration. Successor to Gemini CLI.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 20 agent requests/day (~5 hour refresh). 5 requests/minute. Tab completions and basic editor features unlimited.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier cut ~92% from original 250 req/day. No credit card required. All 5 models available on free tier but heavily rate-limited. Compute-based usage replacing daily limits.

notes: Direct successor to Gemini CLI — free tier stops June 18, 2026. Three surfaces: Desktop App (VS Code fork), CLI (agy, Go-based closed-source), SDK. Launched Nov 2025, v2.0 at Google I/O May 2026. Paid: AI Pro $20/mo, AI Ultra $249.99/mo. Pay-as-you-go AI credits: $25 for 2,500 credits.

name: Kiro
description: AWS/Amazon's agentic AI IDE and CLI for spec-driven development, code generation, and autonomous agentic coding. Evolved from Amazon Q Developer CLI.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 50 credits/month. Simple prompts use <1 credit, complex tasks use more. Overage $0.04/credit.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier includes Claude Sonnet 4.5 and open weight models (Qwen3 Coder Next, DeepSeek v3.2, MiniMax M2.1). Paid: Pro $20/mo (1000 credits), Pro+ $40/mo (2000 credits), Power $200/mo (10000 credits).

notes: AWS product evolved from Amazon Q Developer CLI. Open source (GitHub: kirodotdev/Kiro, 3.9k stars). No AWS account needed for basic use. NOT related to Kilo Code. CLI install: curl -fsSL https://cli.kiro.dev/install | bash.

name: Kilo CLI
description: Open-source AI coding agent for the terminal. CLI component of the Kilo Code platform with 500+ models, agentic coding, and file editing.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Free models limited to upstream provider rate limits. User-configurable in settings.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free models via Auto Free (kilo-auto/free) tier. No credit card required. BYOK also free. Credits only needed for paid models via Kilo Gateway.

notes: CLI component of Kilo Code platform (VS Code + JetBrains + CLI + Cloud + Slack). Same engine as extension. Built on OpenCode by SST (MIT). Apache 2.0. npm: @kilocode/cli. Free tier includes unlimited usage of select free models.

name: Codex CLI
description: OpenAI's open-source, Rust-built terminal-based coding agent that reads, edits, and runs code locally with OS-level sandboxing.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: limited (ChatGPT Free plan — very limited Codex access)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: ChatGPT Free: very limited. Plus: 15-80 GPT-5.5 msgs/5h. Pro 5x: 80-400/5h. API key: usage-based pricing. No specific Codex limits published separately.
free_tier_limits.notes: ChatGPT Free plan includes limited Codex access. No free API credits specifically for Codex — standard $5 new account free credits apply for API key auth.

notes: Open source (Apache-2.0), 90k+ GitHub stars. Requires ChatGPT account or OpenAI API key. Built in Rust. Sandbox: Seatbelt (macOS), Bubblewrap+Landlock (Linux), AppContainer (Windows). Features: web search, MCP, skills, plugins, subagents. Available on macOS, Linux, Windows.

name: Plandex
description: Open source, terminal-based AI coding agent designed for large tasks, large files, and large projects with a plan-and-execute approach and 2M token context window.
top_models: Gemini 2.5 Flash (Google AI Studio free tier)

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: No Plandex-imposed limits. OpenRouter free models have rate limits. Google AI Studio free tier ~60 req/min. Ollama local unlimited.
free_tier_limits.notes: Fully open source (MIT). Cloud service shut down Nov 2025. Now self-hosted/BYOK only. Use OpenRouter free tier, Google AI Studio, or Ollama for zero cost.

notes: Open source (MIT, 15.2k GitHub stars, Go). Written by Dane (danenania). Cloud service shut down Nov 2025 — self-hosted only. Key differentiator: 'plan and execute' — breaks tasks into sequential steps, summarizes context between steps. Cumulative diff review sandbox. 2M token context. Model pack system routes different roles to different models.

name: Mentat
description: AI coding assistant originally a terminal CLI tool, now pivoted to a cloud-native GitHub bot agent that reviews PRs, fixes CI, and resolves merge conflicts.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: 3,000 free credits (~$30) for new cloud users
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Usage-based. 19.5% margin on API costs. 3000 free credits for new cloud users.
free_tier_limits.notes: Original CLI (v1.0.18, Apr 2024) was free/open-source BYOK. Now pivoted to cloud GitHub bot. CLI repo archived.

notes: By AbanteAI. Started as open-source Python CLI (PyPI: mentat) using GPT-4 with multi-file editing, RAG auto-context, and universal-ctags. Last CLI release v1.0.18 (Apr 2024). Pivoted to cloud GitHub bot (github.com/apps/mentatbot) — PR review, CI/CD fix, merge conflict resolution. 50k+ repos installed. Original CLI archived.
